offense.name: Offensive Tactics
offense.description: Unlock squad slots, squad combat boosters, and destructive raid abilities.

defense.name: Fortifications
defense.description: Unlock high-tier traps, advanced automated turrets, and reinforced barricades.

utility.name: Logistics & Intel
utility.description: Decrease scouting costs, expand protected storage capacity, and boost currency drops.

nodes.name: Squad Expansion I
nodes.description: Unlocks the 2nd squad member slot. Power in numbers.

nodes.name: Reinforced Vests
nodes.description: Increases max HP of all squad members by +15%.

nodes.name: Combat Medicine
nodes.description: Unlocks the Medkit active ability. Heal squad members for 40 HP during raids.

nodes.name: Adrenaline Rush
nodes.description: Increases squad movement speed by +10%.

nodes.name: Heavy Melee Gears
nodes.description: Increases melee damage against barricades by +50%.

nodes.name: Breaching Charges
nodes.description: Unlocks the Breaching Charge active ability. Destroys any targeted barricade tile instantly.

nodes.name: Squad Expansion II
nodes.description: Unlocks the 3rd squad member slot. Formidable fireteams.

nodes.name: Tactical Armor Sheets
nodes.description: Further increases squad max HP by +20% (accumulative).

nodes.name: EMP Disruption
nodes.description: Unlocks the EMP Grenade ability. Disable targeted turrets in a Chebyshev radius 1 zone for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Squad Expansion III
nodes.description: Unlocks the 4th and final squad member slot. Command a full squad.

nodes.name: Calibrated Triggers
nodes.description: Increases all placed floor/wall trap damage by +20%.

nodes.name: Industrial Components
nodes.description: Adds +1 trigger use for all floor traps before depletion.

nodes.name: Tesla Coil Sentry
nodes.description: Unlocks the advanced Tesla Coil area turret in the catalog.

nodes.name: High-Focus Lenses
nodes.description: Increases all automatic sentry ranges by +1 Chebyshev grid tile.

nodes.name: Expanded Ammo Feeds
nodes.description: Increases sentry turret ammo capacities by +30%.

nodes.name: Wall Flame Vents
nodes.description: Unlocks the Flame Vent wall defense in the catalog.

nodes.name: Steel Reinforcements
nodes.description: Increases barricade structural integrity (HP) by +40%.

nodes.name: Cryo-Adhesive Gels
nodes.description: Increases trap stun & immobilize durations by +1.0 second.

nodes.name: Sentry Patrol Drones
nodes.description: Unlocks mobile Guard Drones in the catalog that patrol paths.

nodes.name: Laser Alarm Grids
nodes.description: Unlocks Wall-to-Wall Laser Grids in the catalog, alerting turrets in Chevalier radius 5.

nodes.name: Mesh Network Relays
nodes.description: Boosts passive Scrap generation in base by +15%.

nodes.name: Hidden Floorboards
nodes.description: Increases protected storage capacity (scrap cap) by +30%.

nodes.name: Proxy Routing
nodes.description: Decreases scouting Intel costs by -25%.

nodes.name: Decryption Scans
nodes.description: Reveals trap positions and types during successful scouts.

nodes.name: Scrap Recycling
nodes.description: Decreases repair scrap costs by -20%.

nodes.name: Overflow Scavengers
nodes.description: Gain +15% more Scrap from all completed PvE and PvP raids.

nodes.name: Deep Mesh Overrides
nodes.description: Decreases scouting costs by another -25% (accumulative).

nodes.name: Reinforced Vault Chambers
nodes.description: Further increases protected storage by +30%.

nodes.name: Soldering Workbenches
nodes.description: Enables passive generation of Components (1 unit per 5 minutes offline/online).

nodes.name: Prestige Smuggling
nodes.description: Boosts raidable Contraband gains in PvP by +25%.
